# SCORE Transition + Exit Lifecycle Hub

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, transition-exit, exit, succession

## Resource purpose
Stage hub for business transition, exit, succession, closure, selling, or other business transition planning.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user is preparing to close, sell, transfer, merge, hand off, or transition the business.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Exit / Transition

## Route the user here when
The user mentions selling, closing, succession, transfer to family, merger, exit, retirement, or orderly wind-down.

## BOSS routing notes
- This is not usually relevant to raw startup-stage users except as long-term awareness.
- For legal, tax, valuation, estate, or transaction decisions, route to qualified professionals.

## Related SCORE links
- Online courses: https://www.score.org/online-courses/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
